focus.title: 今日要览：4 个类目共 20 条更新

items.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
items.summary: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAi's senior leadership, including a long-time former employee.

items.title: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
items.summary: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years

items.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
items.summary: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

items.title: Hugging Face’s CEO on why companies are done renting their AI
items.summary: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years

items.title: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
items.summary: OpenAI's new family of models will continue to power Microsoft's suite of workplace and productivity apps.

items.title: 香港证监会与中国证监会举行高层执法合作会议
items.summary: 中新社香港7月10日电 据香港证券及期货事务监察委员会(简称“香港证监会”)10日消息，香港证监会近日与中国证券监督管理委员会(简称“中国证监会”)在香港召开了第十七次高层执法合作会议，以进一步加强执法协作。

items.title: 以色列被曝在美要求下限制在黎军事行动
items.summary: 据以色列方面当地时间10日消息，应美国要求，以色列政府已下令军方暂缓在黎巴嫩南部开展“被视为敏感”的军事行动。

items.title: “矢志追求真理，始终把准前进方向”——深入学习贯彻习近平总书记在庆祝中国共产党成立105周年大会上重要讲话系列述评之六
items.summary: 新华社北京7月10日电 题：“矢志追求真理，始终把准前进方向”——深入学习贯彻习近平总书记在庆祝中国共产党成立105周年大会上重要讲话系列述评之六

items.title: 特朗普：美方已同意继续和伊朗谈判
items.summary: 当地时间7月10日，美国总统特朗普在其社交媒体“真实社交”发文称，伊朗希望与美方继续“谈判”，美国已同意继续谈判。

items.title: 伊朗外交部：从未提出与美谈判诉求 同意调解方访伊
items.summary: 伊朗外交部发言人巴加埃10日表示，伊朗从未提出过与美国谈判的诉求，但同意调解方访问伊朗。

items.title: 巴黎再度拉响高温红色警报 全法131人溺水丧生
items.summary: 中新社巴黎7月10日电 (记者 李洋)法国新一轮热浪当地时间10日持续，包括巴黎大区所有省份在内的24个省份再度拉响高温红色警报。法国官方称，自6月19日以来，全法已有131人因溺水身亡。

items.title: Meet the crypto billionaires building a world where money buys you a vote
items.summary: They think democracy has run its course - so they're setting up their own nations instead.

items.title: Forced to wait his turn, Marine Le Pen's deputy Bardella returns to the shadows
items.summary: Thirty-year-old Jordan Bardella had been groomed for success as France's next hard-right leader. He will now have to wait longer.

items.title: Apple sues OpenAI, its employees claiming theft of trade secrets
items.summary: Apple said in a Friday lawsuit that OpenAI’s nascent hardware business is “rotten to its core.”

items.title: Man fatally shot by ICE in Houston was not intended target, DHS says
items.summary: Immigration agents were looking for a different person when they shot Lorenzo Salgado Araujo during a traffic stop, officials say.

items.title: Watch: Inside the 30-hour dating retreat run by monks
items.summary: Forget coffee or drinks, the latest dating trend in South Korea takes place somewhere very different, a Buddhist temple.
